source_excerpt: "Willingly!" exclaimed Dorothy; "indeed, it is of no use to me now, and when you have it you can command the Winged Monkeys three times."

source_excerpt: "And I think I shall need their service just those three times," answered Glinda, smiling.

dialogue_text: What will you do when Dorothy has left us?
source_excerpt: Dorothy then gave her the Golden Cap, and the Witch said to the Scarecrow, "What will you do when Dorothy has left us?"

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

dialogue_text: I will return to the Emerald City,
source_excerpt: "I will return to the Emerald City," he replied, "for Oz has made me its ruler and the people like me. The only thing that worries me is how to cross the hill of the Hammer-Heads."
